Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}I've known that girl since we were in elementary school together. She loves fortune telling stuff.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}She used to pull out these weird props from her bag...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}She claimed they were her lucky charms.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}I didn't know she was a fortune-teller.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}I guess she does look weird, sitting there all by herself...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}A fortune-teller, huh...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}That girl's been shy all her life. She doesn't talk to people she doesn't know easily.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}Though I guess that fortune-teller does have a different air about her...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}She seems like someone who has something special.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}Her fortunes are abstract, but she's not trying to confuse you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}You're meant to interpret them, and decide how to act from there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}Well, normally, meeting new friends is something that just happens.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}In this case, I guess you might rely on fortune telling, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}I'd rather look for friends on my own.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}Amazing! Her fortune came true...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}She seems pretty caught up in the moment, though...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}Is she going to be all right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}I've got a few things I'd like to find, too. Maybe I should ask her...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}I know there's such a thing as lucky colors...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}But we're talking about clothes, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}I think it's okay to just choose the clothes you like best...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}I think all she needs to get closer to her friend is a better understanding.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}She says she understands fine, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}Something new about her friend, huh...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}Aren't you supposed to find stuff like that out on your own?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}I have a really bad feeling about this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}She's a little too into this fortune telling stuff...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}I don't think it's good for her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}Yeah... I should confront her, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}No... I should talk to her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}I should talk to her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}I told her she's getting obsessed with fortune telling, but she doesn't seem to listen to me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}I won't give up on her, though.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}I'm her friend... She needs my help, especially at times like this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}Now does seem like the time to use fortune telling...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}But I wonder what she was trying to say.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}"Light will pierce the shadow... Until then, have patience..."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}That stuff about not being able to order food without her fortune... She's just kidding, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}She can't go through the day without her fortune...? This is bordering on addiction.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}What should I do? Maybe I should ask Mama...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}Wait, wouldn't it be weird to get a fortune-teller's advice on shaking an addiction to fortune telling?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}Now I'm really lost...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}This is just wrong...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}But I can't do anything about it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}I can't stop her from doing what she thinks is right.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}A puppet who obeys fortune-tellers, huh...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}That sounds like a pretty accurate description to me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}I hope she wakes up soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}That girl disappeared... She hasn't even been home...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}I should've tried harder to stop her...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}They say if you truly believe, nothing can go wrong, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}Isn't that the way those cultists think, too?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}I think it's better to decide things for yourself and not rely so much on others...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}A puppet who obeys fortune-tellers, huh...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}That sounds like a pretty accurate description to me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}I hope she wakes up soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The girl that I always came here with was finally found...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But she seems like just a husk of her old self. I guess it's that Apathy Syndrome thing people have been getting these days...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 406}I have no other choice but to stay by her side now...[n]{f 1 1}
